summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing for VehicleCardRow full integration. All 17 tests passed (100%). Verified BidMotors detail-page enrichment (engine, drivetrain, current_bid), full payload engagement endpoints (favorites, compare, shares), and admin engagement analytics with REAL data (no mocks).
passed_tests: GET /api/public/vehicles?limit=3 - ALL 3 vehicles have engine, drivetrain, current_bid populated from BidMotors detail-page enrichment
POST /api/favorites with full payload object (vin, title, make, model, year, image, price, currency, lot_number, auction_name, odometer, etc.) - 200 OK
GET /api/favorites/check/{vin} returns isFavorite:true after add - 200 OK
POST /api/compare/add with full payload object - 200 OK
GET /api/compare/me lists the added vehicle - 200 OK
GET /api/admin/engagement/analytics returns REAL data (totalUsers:3, activeUsers:1, engagementRate:33.3) - NOT mock (500/150)
GET /api/admin/engagement/top-vehicles returns REAL vehicles - NO mock VIN 1HGCM82633A123456 found
GET /api/admin/engagement/vin-stats?vin=WDCYC7DH8JX285469 returns REAL counts (favorites:1, compares:1, shares:4) after test actions
GET /api/admin/engagement/top-users returns REAL users - NO mock 'John Doe' found
GET /api/favorites/check/{vin} returns isFavorite:false after delete - 200 OK
GET /api/compare/me does NOT contain test VIN after delete - 200 OK
